en_title: 'To Continue Being Produced Long Term, Games Need to Succeed, Not Just Be Beloved' — John Carmack Responds to id Software Layoffs
cn_title: 卡马克谈id Software裁员：游戏不能只受喜爱，还得成功
subtitle: 工作室的未来仍不明朗
opus_summary: id Software联合创始人约翰·卡马克回应工作室大规模裁员，称感到悲伤但并不愤怒。他认为工作室对微软是边缘业务，游戏若要长期继续推出，不能只靠受玩家喜爱，还必须在商业上成功。

paragraphs.en: John Carmack has responded to the significant layoffs at Doom developer id Software, expressing sadness but not anger or outrage.
paragraphs.cn: 《毁灭战士》开发商id Software遭大规模裁员后，约翰·卡马克作出回应，表示自己感到悲伤，但并不愤怒或愤慨。

paragraphs.en: On Wednesday, a WARN notice filed in Texas reported by Game Developer confirmed that 96 workers had been laid off in Richardson, Texas, home of id Software, with a further 40 remote roles cut. Reports indicate 50% of staff have lost their jobs.
paragraphs.cn: 《Game Developer》报道，得州提交的WARN通知确认，id Software所在地理查森有96名员工被裁，另有40个远程岗位遭削减。报道称，约50%的员工失去了工作。

paragraphs.en: The cuts come as part of new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s reset of Microsoft’s gaming business, which began with 1,600 staff losing their jobs on Monday. Another 1,600 will be let go during the rest of the current financial year. Four Xbox studios are already out the door, with another hot on their heels.
paragraphs.cn: 这轮裁员是新任XBOX CEO Asha Sharma「重置」微软游戏业务的一部分。本周一已有1600人失业，本财年剩余时间还将再裁1600人。已有4家XBOX工作室被剥离，另有一家也岌岌可危。

paragraphs.en: Carmack, who co-founded id Software in 1991 alongside John Romero, Tom Hall, and Adrian Carmack, took to social media to express his belief that the company was a marginal business for Microsoft, and that he couldn’t see an obvious way for it to make more money from its games.
paragraphs.cn: 卡马克于1991年与约翰·罗梅洛、Tom Hall和Adrian Carmack共同创办id Software。他在社交媒体上称，这家公司对微软而言是「边缘业务」，而他看不出其游戏有明显的增收途径。

paragraphs.en: Given Microsoft brought in $281.72 billion in revenue during its last financial year, id Software is little more than a rounding error from such a high-level perspective. I imagine most Xbox studios are the same.
paragraphs.cn: 从高层面看，微软上一财年营收2817.2亿美元(约合人民币1.9万亿元)，id Software的规模确实几乎只是一个四舍五入误差；多数XBOX工作室或许也是如此。

paragraphs.en: Compared to some other Xbox studios, though, id Software was prolific. 2016’s Doom reboot was a blast. Yes, 2019’s Rage 2 struggled, but 2020’s Doom Eternal brought fans back onside. 2022’s Quake Champions has always been a bit of an odd release, but last year’s Doom: The Dark Ages was great fun. These Doom games didn’t sell at Call of Duty levels, but they made their mark.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，与部分XBOX工作室相比，id Software一直高产。2016年的《毁灭战士》重启作令人兴奋；2019年的《狂怒2》虽表现挣扎，但2020年的《毁灭战士：永恒》重新赢得玩家支持。《雷神之锤：冠军》较为另类，去年的《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》则很有乐趣。这些《毁灭战士》游戏卖不到《使命召唤》的级别，但都留下了印记。

paragraphs.en: Carmack also said he believed reports that Minecraft revenues had been carrying several other studios. Many big entertainment companies work in much the same way, with one or two megahits helping to keep the bigger picture lights on.
paragraphs.cn: 卡马克还表示，他相信《我的世界》的收入一直在支撑其他几家工作室。许多大型娱乐公司都以类似方式运营，由一两部超级作品维系整体业务。

paragraphs.en: To continue being produced long term, games need to succeed, not just be beloved. Here he is simply saying that id's recent output has not been successful: while people loved the Doom games, not enough people bought them.
paragraphs.cn: 「游戏若要长期继续推出，就必须成功，不能只受喜爱。」卡马克的意思很直接：id近年的作品并未取得商业成功。玩家喜爱《毁灭战士》，但购买的人不够多。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft does not publish sales numbers or studio revenue. According to GamesBeat, id was formulating ideas including a John Wick-style original IP, a new Perfect Dark game, and a multiplayer/co-op Doom game. Its future is now unclear, and some worry it could be relegated to support status.
paragraphs.cn: 微软不公开游戏销量或工作室营收，因此外界无从得知id今年的财务状况。据GamesBeat报道，id当时正在构思类《疾速追杀》原创IP、新《完美黑暗》及多人合作《毁灭战士》等项目。如今其未来不明，有人担忧这家传奇射击工作室会沦为支援团队。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this week, John Romero offered affected staff his support and called for the studio’s legacy to be preserved. Doom, Quake, and Wolfenstein are not easy names to carry on, especially in today’s industry. The last few games showed real care, skill and respect for what those worlds mean to people.
paragraphs.cn: 本周早些时候，约翰·罗梅洛也向受影响员工表示支持，并呼吁保留工作室的传承。他说：「《毁灭战士》《雷神之锤》和《德军总部》都不是容易延续的招牌，尤其是在当今行业。近几部作品展现了对这些世界所代表意义的真诚、技艺与尊重。」
